kirundi.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Igenzura ry'ukubona ryanze. Idosiye ishobora kuba nini cyane cyangwa idashyigikiwe.
kirundi.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Igenzura ryanze. Gerageza ibindi bikubiyemo cyangwa URL yoroshye.
kirundi.digital_accessibility_lab: ♿ Laboratwari y'Uburyo bwo Kugera ku Bikoresho bya Digitale
kirundi.be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Ba intumwa y'impinduka mu kugera — genzura, wige, uvugire
kirundi.what_is_digital_accessibility: ♿ Uburyo bwo kugera kuri digitale ni iki?
kirundi.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI ikora igenzura rya WCAG 2.1 AA ku iyinjizwa rya URL / HTML / PDF / ifoto ya ecran / imbuga nkoranyambaga / leta. Ibyabonetse bisanzwe: umwandiko usimbura ubuze (1.1.1), itandukaniro ry'amabara munsi ya 4.5:1 (1.4.3), imitego ya keyboard (2.1.1), imyanya idafite akamenyetso (3.3.2).
kirundi.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Bishobora kumvikana, Bishobora gukoreshwa, Bisobanutse, Bikomeye (POUR). Buri gipimo cya WCAG kijyana na kimwe muri ibi. Ubumuga ni ukutahuza hagati y'umubiri n'ibidukikije, ntibikunze kuba imiterere y'umuntu.
kirundi.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, yashinzwe 1999) iyobora OpenAIR — hackathon y'ukugera imaze igihe kirekire ku isi — kandi itoza abahanga binyuze muri AccessU. Banditse igice kinini cy'igitabo cy'amabwiriza buri mugenzuzi w'iki gihe akoresha.
kirundi.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: Ntukeneye umunyamategeko kugira ngo utange ikirego cya ADA Title II / III. Ishami ry'Ubutabera (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), n'ibiro by'abashinjacyaha bakuru ba leta byose byakira ibirego by'abaturage — kandi urubuga rwa leta rutaboneka ni urinyuranyije n'amategeko.
kirundi.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Amagenzura ashize abikwa hano kugira ngo ubashe gukurikirana ni izihe mbuga zateye imbere (cyangwa zangiritse) mu gihe. Imibare ihujwe ikwemerera kugaragaza ikibazo gishobora gusangirwa na IT y'ishuri cyangwa umucuruzi.
kirundi.first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: Igenzura rya mbere, Amagenzura 5, Amagenzura 10, Umuhigi w'Ibibazo Bikomeye, Inararibonye ya POUR, n'ibindi. Kwemera akazi kadafite ubwiza ko gufata ibibazo *mbere* y'uko bigera ku bakoresha bafite ubumuga.
kirundi.the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: AI izasesengura uburyo bwo kugera ku rubuga ishingiye ku miterere yarwo izwi n'uburyo busanzwe.
kirundi.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Omeka kode iyo ari yo yose ya HTML — iva mu mushinga w'ishuri, urupapuro rwa interineti, cyangwa yakozwe n'igikoresho cyo gukora kode. AI izayigenzura ku bibazo byo kugera.
kirundi.upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Ohereza inyandiko ya PDF kugira ngo ugenzure uburyo bwo kuyigeraho
kirundi.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI izagenzura: imiterere ifite ibimenyetso, urutonde rwo gusoma, umwandiko usimbura ku mashusho, ibimenyetso by'amafishi, itandukaniro ry'amabara, itangazo ry'ururimi, n'urutonde rw'imitwe.
kirundi.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Ohereza ifoto ya ecran y'urubuga, porogaramu, cyangwa inyandiko
kirundi.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI izasesengura ifoto ya ecran mu maso: ibibazo by'itandukaniro ry'amabara, ibimenyetso bibuze, ibibazo by'igishushanyo, ukubasha gusoma umwandiko, n'inzitizi zo kugera mu maso.
kirundi.upload_screenshot_for_accessibility_au: Ohereza ifoto ya ecran y'igenzura ry'ukugera
kirundi.social_media_post_audit: Igenzura ry'inyandiko yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga
kirundi.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Omeka umwandiko w'inyandiko (shyiramo hashtags, kuvuga, n'ibisobanuro by'amashusho)
kirundi.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Omeka umwandiko wuzuye w'inyandiko hano...

Shyiramo:
• Ibikubiyemo byose by'umwandiko
• Hashtags
• Ibisobanuro by'amashusho (niba bihari)
• URL z'amahuza
kirundi.social_media_post_text: Umwandiko w'inyandiko yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga
kirundi.audit_social_media_post: Genzura inyandiko yo ku mbuga nkoranyambaga
kirundi.rewrite_post_accessibly: Subiramo inyandiko mu buryo bworoshye kugera
kirundi.checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Igenzura: umwandiko usimbura, amagambo yanditse, hashtags za CamelCase, aho emoji iri, ukubasha gusoma, itandukaniro, n'umwandiko mu mashusho.
kirundi.government_school_title_ii_audit: Igenzura rya Title II rya leta / ishuri
kirundi.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Genzura imbuga za leta n'amashuri ku bijyanye no kubahiriza ADA Title II. Birimo igenzura risanzwe rya WCAG n'ibisabwa byihariye bya Title II.
kirundi.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Igenzura WCAG 2.1 AA + amakuru ya Coordinateur wa ADA, itangazo ry'ukugera, uburyo bwo gutanga ikirego, gushyira ibimenyetso kuri PDF, ukugera ku mafishi, amagambo yanditse, n'ibikoresho by'abandi.
kirundi.running_wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility_audi: Hakorwa igenzura ry'ukugera rya WCAG 2.1 AA...
kirundi.checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Hagenzurwa imiterere, amashusho, itandukaniro, ukugera kuri keyboard, n'ibindi
kirundi.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: Iri nota rikozwe na model ya AI itekereza ku byo ishobora kubona — si ikizamini cya WCAG cyikora. Emeza imibare nyayo y'itandukaniro, urutonde rwa keyboard, n'aho byibandwaho ukoresheje ibikoresho nka axe, WAVE, cyangwa Lighthouse.
kirundi.title_ii_things_to_investigate: ⚖️ Title II — ibintu byo gukora iperereza
kirundi.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow ntishobora kuzana cyangwa kugenzura urubuga rukora — ibi ni amakekero ya AI aturuka ku makuru y'imyitozo, si ibyavumbuwe byemejwe. Ntukavuge ko bibahiriza cyangwa ngo utange ikirego ushingiye kuri byo utabanje kugenzura buri kimwe wenyine.
kirundi.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: ibipimo by'ibanze. Kanda icyo ari cyo cyose kugira ngo wige byinshi.
kirundi.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: Igipimo nyacyo cya WCAG kibaruwa muri mushakisha yawe kiva ku rumuri rugereranya — si igitekerezo cya AI. Hitamo ibara ry'umwandiko n'ibara ry'inyuma.
kirundi.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Munini = 18pt+ (cyangwa 14pt+ byibobora). Iyi ni yo mibare nyayo axe / WAVE / Lighthouse zikoresha.
kirundi.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Kanda Tab kugira ngo unyure hagati y'aya mabuto abiri. Rimwe rerekana aho keyboard yibanze; irindi rirahisha — ukoresha keyboard gusa yazimira.
kirundi.creating_an_inclusive_digital_world_si: Gukora isi ya digitale irimo bose kuva 1999
kirundi.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Inama y'amahugurwa ya buri mwaka y'ubushobozi (hybrid). Yiswe Dr. John Slatin, yigisha ubuhanga bufatika mu gukora kode, ukoreshwa, n'igishushanyo kirimo bose. Igice gikurikira: Gicurasi 11–14, 2026.
kirundi.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Irushanwa mpuzamahanga rikorerwa kuri interineti rimara ibyumweru 8 rihuza inzobere za web z'abakorerabushake n'imiryango itari iy'inyungu kugira ngo bubake imbuga ziboneka. Ryatangiye nka hackathon y'umunsi umwe ryiyongera riba gahunda y'ibanze ya Knowbility.
kirundi.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Fasha mu kwiyandikisha, kwakira amasaro, no gushyigikira. Bona uburenganzira bwo kwitabira inama ku buntu ku gice cy'amasaha 4-8.
kirundi.developers_designers_and_content_creat: Abakora porogaramu, abashushanya, n'abakora ibikubiyemo bubaka imbuga ziboneka ku miryango itari iy'inyungu.
kirundi.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Witabire ibice bya AccessU, koresha ibikoresho by'ubuntu, kandi wubake ubuhanga bwawe bwo kugera.
kirundi.use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Koresha IKI gikoresho kugira ngo ugenzure kandi utange raporo y'inzitizi zo kugera. Ba intumwa y'impinduka mu muryango wawe!
kirundi.visit_knowbility_volunteer_today: ♿ Sura Knowbility — korera ubushake uyu munsi
kirundi.ada_title_ii_digital_accessibility: ⚖️ ADA Title II n'ukugera kuri digitale
kirundi.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Wabonye inzitizi zo kugera? Kora urwandiko rw'ikirego rwemewe usaba impinduka. Hitamo uwo wohereza:
kirundi.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: urugero Portland Public Schools, Umujyi wa Austin
kirundi.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Sobanura ingaruka (ni nde bigira ingaruka n'uko)
kirundi.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: urugero Umwana wanjye akoresha umusomyi wa ecran kandi ntashobora kunyura mu mafishi yo kwiyandikisha...
kirundi.contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Banza uvugane na Coordinateur wa ADA w'urwego — akenshi bashobora gukemura ibibazo vuba.
kirundi.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Niba bitakemutse, tanga ikirego kuri DOJ kuri ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
kirundi.you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: Ushobora kandi kohereza ibaruwa kuri: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
kirundi.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Nta genzura riraboneka. Koresha igenzura ryawe rya mbere kugira ngo urebe ibisubizo hano.
